props.dotSize: Changes the size of the selection dot on the canvas.
props.eyeDropperIcon: Icon used to trigger EyeDropper API.
props.mode: The current selected input type. Syncable with `v-model:mode`.
props.readonly: Puts the color picker in a readonly state.
props.swatches: Sets the available color swatches to select from. 2D array of rows and columns, accepts any color format the picker does.
props.swatchesMaxHeight: Sets the maximum height of the swatches section.
props.width: Sets the width of the color picker.
